statement.en: Investigating the spatial pathology of fibrosis and inflammation in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is an embargo-restricted thesis with no accessible abstract, methods, results, or claims to evaluate. The axiom itself is observation-impossible in the current context—evaluation cannot proceed without content.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 瘢痕と炎症の周期的な干渉が、呼吸の衰退を支配する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 肺の内部に巣食う瘢痕組織が、生命の息吹を徐々に絞り殺す。
